backendFiles.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper
  PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
  "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="com.example.am.form.mapper.FormPageMapper">

  <!-- Legacy chain: EgovSampleController.selectScoreList -> EgovSampleServiceImpl.ScoreChk -> SampleDAO.ScoreChk -->
  <!-- Legacy SQL map: sampleDAO.ScoreChk -->
  <!-- Legacy query hint: select A.stuno as stuno,B.STUNAME as stuname, To_char(round(avg(score),0)) as avgscore, To_char(Rank() over(order by avg(score) DESC)) as rank, To_char(DENSE_RANK() OVER(order by avg(score) DESC,(select score from sco... -->
  <!-- Verify joins for additional tables: student_jew -->
  <select id="search" parameterType="com.example.am.form.dto.FormPageSearchCondition" resultType="com.example.am.form.dto.FormPageRow">
    select A.stuno as stuno,B.STUNAME as stuname, To_char(round(avg(score),0)) as avgscore, To_char(Rank() over(order by avg(score) DESC)) as rank, 
    	To_char(DENSE_RANK() OVER(order by avg(score) DESC,(select score from score_jew where stuno=A.Stuno and subcode='S001' and year='2019' and testcategory=#{testCategory}) DESC,
    	(select score from score_jew where stuno=A.Stuno and subcode='S002' and year='2019' and testcategory=#{testCategory}) DESC,
    	(select score from score_jew where stuno=A.Stuno and subcode='S003' and year='2019' and testcategory=#{testCategory}) DESC)) as denseRank
        from score_jew A
        join student_jew B
        on A.Stuno=B.Stuno
        where A.YEAR='2019' and A.TESTCATEGORY=#{testCategory}
        group by A.stuno, B.STUNAME
        union
        select '' as stuno, '총인원' as stuname, To_char(count(B.STUNO)) as avgscore, '' as rank, '' as denseRank
        from score_jew A
        join student_jew B
        on A.Stuno=B.Stuno
        where A.YEAR='2019' and A.TESTCATEGORY=#{testCategory}
        group by A.stuno, B.STUNAME
        union
        select '' as stuno, '총평균' as stuname, To_char((round(avg(score),0))) as avgscore, '' as rank, '' as denseRank
        from score_jew A
        join student_jew B
        on A.Stuno=B.Stuno
        where A.YEAR='2019' and A.TESTCATEGORY=#{testCategory}
        order by 4 nulls last ,5 nulls last
  </select>

  <!-- Legacy lookup route: http://127.0.0.1:8080/miplatform/testNameList.do -->
  <!-- Legacy SQL map: sampleDAO.testNameList -->
  <!-- Query hint: SELECT distinct testCategory, testname FROM score_jew WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY testCategory ASC -->
  <select id="selectTestCategoryOptions" resultType="com.example.am.form.dto.FormPageLookupOption">
    SELECT
      testCategory AS value,
      testname AS label
    FROM score_jew
    GROUP BY testCategory, testname
    ORDER BY testCategory ASC
  </select>
</mapper>

handoffPrompts.stage3-frontend:
Using the stage 1 package, stage 2 plan, and Vue page config for form, implement the frontend files (frontend/src/pages/form/FormPage.vue, frontend/src/composables/useFormPage.ts, frontend/src/api/form.ts). Preserve the interaction pattern grid-page, treat ds_scorechk as the main business result, and keep platform features out of local reimplementation. Build the search area from 성적조회(Button0, dataset=no dataset); 시험(Combo0, dataset=ds_testCategory, field=testCategory); 과목 담당교수(Button1, dataset=no dataset); 장학금대상(Button2, dataset=no dataset). Render the main data grid using Grid0 -> dataset ds_scorechk, headers 학생번호, 학생명, 평균점수, 등수, 석차. Implement action flows 성적조회/Button0_OnClick [button-flow] tx=TX-BUTTON0ONCLICK-1; nav=no navigation; form_OnLoadCompleted/form_OnLoadCompleted [page-load] tx=no transaction; nav=no navigation; 과목 담당교수/Button1_OnClick [button-flow] tx=no transaction; nav=scurl; 장학금대상/Button2_OnClick [button-flow] tx=no transaction; nav=scholarship. Respect validation/state/message rules: validation[Combo0:어떤 시험입니까? 콤보박스에서 확인해주세요] state[Grid0 Enable=True; Grid0 Visible=True; Grid0 TabStop=True] messages[디와이정보기술 2019학년도 성적조회; 성적조회; 시험]. Keep related-screen handling explicit: Button1_OnClick -> scurl (subview, params=no parameter bindings); Button2_OnClick -> scholarship (popup, params="param="+Quote(param), 600, 300, AutoSize=false resize=false).

Contract summary:
- Primary dataset: ds_scorechk
- Legacy endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:8080/miplatform/testScoreChk.do
- Search fields: testCategory
- Grid columns: stuno, stuname, avgscore, rank, denseRank
- Lookup loaders: testCategory
handoffPrompts.stage3-backend:
Using the stage 1 package, stage 2 plan, and Vue page config for form, implement the backend files (backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/web/FormPageController.java, backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/service/FormPageService.java, backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/service/impl/FormPageServiceImpl.java, backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/dto/FormPageSearchCondition.java, backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/dto/FormPageRow.java, backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/mapper/FormPageMapper.java, backend/src/main/resources/mapper/FormPageMapper.xml). Map the legacy route http://127.0.0.1:8080/miplatform/testScoreChk.do through EgovSampleController.selectScoreList. Preserve business behavior, but expose cleaner Spring Boot request/response DTOs. Honor endpoint contracts TX-TESTNAMESELECT-1 url=http://127.0.0.1:8080/miplatform/testNameList.do params=no params variable callback=fnCallback sql=sampleDAO.testNameList; TX-FNCMTR-1 url="svc::" + strController params=params callback=fnCallback sql=sql map unresolved; TX-BUTTON0ONCLICK-1 url=http://127.0.0.1:8080/miplatform/testScoreChk.do params=strParam callback=fnCallback sql=sampleDAO.ScoreChk. Align request parameters, callbacks, and button/onload flows with 성적조회/Button0_OnClick [button-flow] tx=TX-BUTTON0ONCLICK-1; nav=no navigation; form_OnLoadCompleted/form_OnLoadCompleted [page-load] tx=no transaction; nav=no navigation; 과목 담당교수/Button1_OnClick [button-flow] tx=no transaction; nav=scurl; 장학금대상/Button2_OnClick [button-flow] tx=no transaction; nav=scholarship.

Contract summary:
- Primary dataset: ds_scorechk
- Legacy endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:8080/miplatform/testScoreChk.do
- Search fields: testCategory
- Grid columns: stuno, stuname, avgscore, rank, denseRank
- Legacy SQL map id: sampleDAO.ScoreChk
